title: Cortex Chess
description: A from-scratch chess engine AND analysis studio in TypeScript — PVS search, transposition tables, SEE, quiescence and a tapered eval, with in-browser KPK/KRK/KQK endgame tablebases. Play it, or open the Analyze board to import a PGN, step through with a multi-PV engine and a whole-game evaluation graph.
